description: Vue stack — Vue 3.5 + vue-router 4 Vite SPA + Zod 4 family.

deps.vue: 3.5 (^3.5.0 — Composition API, <script setup lang="ts"> SFC pages)
deps.vue-router: 4 (createWebHistory SPA mode; explicit route table in src/router.ts)
deps.@tanstack/vue-query: 5 (role-for-role analog of the react packs' react-query)
deps.vue-tsc: 2 (carries the .vue type surface — the SFC analogue of svelte-check)
deps.zod: 4 (^4.0.0 — same family as stack v3 so wire schemas match the react packs)

bundler.comment: No in-browser playground bundling for vue packs yet (vue-frontend-plan.md defers playground preview — needs the Vue SFC compiler in the VFS bundler), so no bundler policy beyond the defaults.
